sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: Define the purpose: ensure the QMS is suitable, adequate and effective and identify opportunities for improvement; meet ISO 13485:2016 §5.6 and (for EU markets) MDR Article 10 obligations.

sections.title: 2. Frequency and Attendees
sections.section_prompt: State minimum review frequency (at least annually; quarterly recommended for early-stage companies). List required attendees (CEO, QA Manager, Management Representative, RA Lead, Engineering Lead, Operations Lead, Clinical/Medical Affairs if applicable). Define quorum and chair.

rows.input: Changes that could affect the QMS
Applicable new or revised regulatory requirements

sections.title: 4. Required Outputs (Clause 5.6.3)
sections.section_prompt: List required outputs: improvements needed to maintain suitability/adequacy/effectiveness of the QMS; improvements to product related to customer requirements; changes needed to respond to new/revised regulatory requirements; resource needs. Each output must have a named owner, due date, and tracking ID linked to {ref:CA-001} where corrective action is required.

sections.title: 5. Procedure
sections.section_prompt: Step-by-step: 30 days before meeting — Management Rep issues data-collection request to input owners; 7 days before — agenda + pre-read circulated; meeting — review each input, decide actions; within 5 business days — minutes drafted using {ref:QF-001} and circulated for approval; within 30 days — actions logged and tracked to closure; effectiveness verified at next review.

sections.title: 6. Records
sections.section_prompt: List records produced: pre-read data pack, signed minutes ({ref:QF-001}), action register. Retention per {ref:QP-004}.
